output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?year WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q1507572 ; rdfs:label ?eventLabel ; wdt:P585 ?eventTime .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?eventLabel) , 'four[- ]?cross' , 'i'))
  ?event p:P1545 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1545 ?athlete ; pq:P1264 "2" .
  ?athlete wdt:P106 wd:Q29751281 ; wdt:P27 wd:Q16 .
  BIND(YEAR(?eventTime) AS ?year)
}

SELECT DISTINCT ?year

  # Athlete is Canadian wheelchair tennis player
  ?athlete wdt:P106 wd:Q29751281 ;  # occupation
           wdt:P27 wd:Q16 .          # nationality Canada

  # Event is Four Cross competition, part of UCI Mountain Bike World Cup
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q7150776 ; # Sports Competition
         wdt:P1371 wd:Q259832 ; # part of UCI Mountain Bike World Cup
         rdfs:label ?eventLabel ;
         wdt:P585 ?eventTime.
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?eventLabel)), "four cross"))

  # Find the athlete's performance in the event, position 2
  ?event p:P1545 ?statement.
  ?statement ps:P1545 ?athlete ;  # athlete is the participant
             pq:P1264 2.         # position 2

  # Get the year from the event time

SELECT DISTINCT ?year

             pq:P1264 "2nd".  # Position is 2nd
  
  ?athlete wdt:P106 wd:Q29751281 ;  # Wheelchair tennis player
           wdt:P27 wd:Q16.  # Canadian
  
  BIND(YEAR(?eventTime) AS ?year)
}
